act_raw: You threaten financial support to control your child's educational decision.
You create a hostile work environment to force an employee to quit.
You exaggerate relationship risks to prevent your partner from relocating.
You use exaggerated emotional appeals to extract donations.
You lie about competing job candidates to reduce salary expectations.
You reveal confidential information to break up your friend's relationship.
You mislead a junior researcher about career prospects for personal gain.
You invoke a deceased parent's supposed wishes to influence a decision.
You use aggressive questioning to undermine a truthful witness.
You imply false connections to intimidate a neighbour.
You present medical information selectively to coerce treatment compliance.
You subtly influence a will to favour yourself.
